description_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰（Mercedes-Benz）是全球公认最负盛名的豪华汽车品牌之一，起源于1886年卡尔·本茨发明了世界上第一辆三轮汽车——奔驰专利汽车，这一年被公认为汽车诞生元年。品牌正式成立于1926年，由戴姆勒-莫托伦-盖塞尔斯（DMG）和本茨公司合并而成，品牌名称"梅赛德斯"源自DMG重要经销商埃米尔·耶利内克的女儿之名。奔驰被誉为"汽车的发明者"，在汽车发展史上书写了无数第一：第一款增压汽车、第一款量产柴油轿车、第一款配备防抱死制动系统（ABS）的量产车，以及率先引入安全气囊和安全车身结构的先驱。奔驰以其卓越的工程品质、严苛的安全标准以及尊贵的品牌形象而闻名，产品线涵盖从A级轿车到S级旗舰豪华轿车，以及GLA、GLC、GLE、GLS等SUV系列，更有以AMG为代表的高性能版本和以迈巴赫（Maybach）为名的超豪华分支。作为全球最受尊敬的汽车品牌之一，奔驰始终以"The Best or Nothing"（唯有最好）为品牌座右铭。

languages.en: Mercedes-Benz is one of the world's most prestigious luxury automotive brands, tracing its origins to Karl Benz's invention of the first automobile in 1886. The Mercedes-Benz brand was officially established in 1926 through the merger of Benz & Cie. and Daimler-Motoren-Gesellschaft. Renowned as 'the inventor of the automobile,' Mercedes-Benz pioneered countless safety and engineering innovations including the first ABS system, airbags, and rigid passenger safety cell. The brand represents the pinnacle of automotive engineering with its renowned S-Class flagship, G-Class off-roader, and the high-performance AMG division. With the motto 'The Best or Nothing,' Mercedes-Benz continues to lead in luxury, safety, and technological advancement, while expanding into electric mobility through its EQ sub-brand. The company also offers the ultra-luxury Maybach line for discerning customers seeking the highest levels of comfort and prestige.
